mapper.insert: insert into position (company_id, category_id, position_name, department, position_type, province, city, district, detail_address, salary_min, salary_max, description, requirements, internship_start_date, internship_end_date, planned_recruit, recruited_count, remaining_quota, status, publish_date, create_time, update_time) values (#{companyId}, #{categoryId}, #{positionName}, #{department}, #{positionType}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{detailAddress}, #{salaryMin}, #{salaryMax}, #{description}, #{requirements}, #{internshipStartDate}, #{internshipEndDate}, #{plannedRecruit}, #{recruitedCount}, #{remainingQuota}, #{status}, #{publishDate}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update position
company_id = #{companyId},
category_id = #{categoryId},
position_name = #{positionName},
department = #{department},
position_type = #{positionType},
province = #{province},
city = #{city},
district = #{district},
detail_address = #{detailAddress},
salary_min = #{salaryMin},
salary_max = #{salaryMax},
description = #{description},
requirements = #{requirements},
internship_start_date = #{internshipStartDate},
internship_end_date = #{internshipEndDate},
planned_recruit = #{plannedRecruit},
recruited_count = #{recruitedCount},
remaining_quota = #{remainingQuota},
status = #{status},
publish_date = #{publishDate},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from position order by create_time desc
select * from position where company_id = #{companyId} order by create_time desc

select * from position
company_id = #{companyId}
and
position_name like concat('%',#{positionName},'%')
order by create_time desc

SELECT * FROM position WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM position WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM position ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM position ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.company_id AS companyId, c.company_name AS companyName, p.position_name AS positionName, p.requirements, p.planned_recruit AS plannedRecruit, p.recruited_count AS recruitedCount, p.remaining_quota AS remainingQuota, p.create_time AS createTime, p.update_time AS updateTime FROM position p LEFT JOIN company_users c ON p.company_id = c.id
c.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{companyName}, '%')
AND
p.position_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{positionName}, '%')
ORDER BY p.remaining_quota DESC, p.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalPositions, COALESCE(SUM(planned_recruit), 0) AS totalPlanned, COALESCE(SUM(recruited_count), 0) AS totalRecruited, COALESCE(SUM(remaining_quota), 0) AS totalGap FROM position

SELECT su.id, su.student_user_id AS studentUserId, su.name, m.name AS majorName, sis.status, CASE sis.status WHEN 0 THEN '未找到实习' WHEN 1 THEN '有Offer未确定' WHEN 2 THEN '已确定实习' WHEN 3 THEN '实习结束' ELSE '未知' END AS statusText FROM student_internship_status sis INNER JOIN student_users su ON sis.student_id = su.id LEFT JOIN major m ON su.major_id = m.id WHERE sis.position_id = #{positionId} ORDER BY sis.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM position WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
